title: HAUTMEC Pro Chalk Line, 30m/100ft Chalk Line Reel with 6:1 Gear Ratio, Rubber Long Handle, Easy Top Loading, Ideal for Deck Builders, Framers, and Roofers HT0384-CL
features: 【Durable and Sturdy】: This chalk line features a rugged ABS rubber shell with impact resistance, designed to withstand wear and tear on job sites

【Wear-Resistant Reinforcement】: This 100ft chalk line tool features a 1mm-thick line that balances chalk retention and reduced overspray, providing 5-6 crisp lines per pull, even in harsh construction conditions

【Extra-Large Fill Port】: Enhances visibility and efficiency when refilling the chalk line reel. The nested hook design allows for compact storage and portability, and can interlock with other chalk reels for dual use
【Convenient and Fast】: The chalk line box features a 6:1 gear ratio, with a handle design that allows for smooth and rapid retraction, enabling professionals to mark job sites quickly and efficiently

【Easy to Secure】: The long handle of the chalk reel allows for one-handed operation, while the hub lock securely holds the reel in place. The end hook slides smoothly into the storage notch, preventing it from catching on other items in your tool kit
description: Product Description 6:1 RATIO GEAR SPEED HAUTMEC Chalk line features a 6:1 planetary gear ratio for rewinding 6X faster than traditional chalk line reels for fewer breaks. LINE RELEASE & REWIND Clutch system allows for reducing line jams and smoothing line release, and a fast rewind. Steel handle and center hub for increased durability, strength, and torque. ERGONOMIC GRIP The ergonomic grip provides a secure grip and feel, Easy to grip LARGE REFILL MOUTH Powders can be added quickly and easily, and for clean and precise lines. Avoid chalk spillage with transparent lid for easy refill.
